programme.title: Ghost Dimension: WW2 Hospital Haunting
programme.desc: Built in the early 1900’s and now used as offices, a former world war hospital has become the new home for something supernatural. Strange voices, eerie footsteps and the sounds of painful screams have all been reported. What will be uncovered tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Supernatural Gateway
programme.desc: Bex and Sean explore Gwrych Castle in Wales, renowned for its hauntings. Amid eerie voices, strange noises, and shadows, they use specialized equipment to unveil the spectral mysteries lurking within. Will they unearth Gwrych Castle's ghostly secrets?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Secrets of the Unknown
programme.desc: In the thrilling conclusion, Bex and Sean return to Gwrych Castle for intense paranormal investigations. Eerie chambers, mysterious apparitions, and chilling whispers await as they seek conclusive otherworldly proof.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Phantoms of Formby: Starfish Bunker Unveiled
programme.desc: Join "Ghost Dimension" at Merseyside's Formby Starfish Bunker. Unveil its wartime secrets, encountering eerie whispers, phantom footsteps, and soldier apparitions. Can they capture undeniable proof of the paranormal?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sands Lake Secrets: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: Explore paranormal phenomena at Sands Lake – from mysterious voices to ghostly encounters. The secrets of this haunting location are unveiled.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Something in the Water
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Excelsior Springs, Missouri to investigate The Elms Resort & Spa.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Undying Love
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Monticello, Arkansas to investigate a mansion with a dark history involving an ill-fated and secret love story that ended with a woman committing suicide.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Coroner's Case
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Shreveport, Louisiana where the employees and owner of the Rendall Building are experiencing terrifying paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Shock Island / Asylum & Testing Lab / The Surf Hotel
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Scott Township, Pennsylvania to investigate the Pennsylvania Asylum and Testing Lab.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hyde & Seek
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Cooperstown, New York, to investigate Hyde Hall.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Orphans of Gettysburg
programme.desc: On this premiere episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gettysburg to look into strange phenomena that connects civil war orphans with 3 locations and the 150thanniversary of the Battle of Gettysburg.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P2
programme.desc: Stuart enters the underbelly of this remarkable building and starts to witness some very strange occurrences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Armely Mills Cottage
programme.desc: The cottage on the site of Armley Mills is said to be full of paranormal activity so Karl decides to enter, alone and witnesses something that is eager to grab his attention.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison
programme.desc: Abandoned prisons are always a daunting prospect and the Most Haunted team love them. This time Karl takes on HMP Shrewsbury alone and experiences some of the unhappy phantoms that lurk in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P1
programme.desc: With a history dating back to 1185, Salmesbury Hall is of the UK’s most historic buildings and said to be one of the most haunted. With ghost stories and sightings all over the building, Stuart investigates the ground floor.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl investigates the upper floors of this historic building dating back to 1185, and realises he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the very haunted school room in the large imposing Gressenhall Workhouse. The activity starts even before Karl gets into the building and becomes one of the most impressive investigations to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates two buildings, a forge and the cottage. He could not have imagined the activity that unfolded around him.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Devil's Autograph, Mail Order Degree, The News Stand, The Murder of Roy Hennessey, Mysterious Strangers.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Cup of Joe, Secret of the Family Tomb, Wheezer, The Unknown Patient.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Apparition, The Electric Chair, On the Road, Number One with a Bullet, Dream House.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Writer's Agent, Crypt Ghost, The Doll, Hubert's Curse, Shared Vision.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Creepy Comics, Louie the Dip, The Wailing, The Landlady, Curse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Confessions
programme.desc: An unknown entity appears to find pleasure in terrifying 17-year-old Macy Sherman, her younger sister Kelsey and their mom Carrie. The family reaches out for help, praying that they can get rid of the spirit intent on staying in their home forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Love Curse
programme.desc: When Lee and his new bride Claire settle into their first home, an evil entity emerges and attacks Claire while she's carrying the couple's unborn baby. A ghost hunter determines the dark spirit is a demon and brings in demonologists to cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: When The Lights Go Out
programme.desc: After newlyweds Brooke and Dominic Ardolino experience strange paranormal events in their home, they call in investigators who uncover two spirits – one is trying to warn them while the other is dangerous.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Lair
programme.desc: For years, the Cranmer family thought their historic Pittsburgh dream home was haunted by a harmless ghost. But, when the activity grows violent, they fight back with the only weapon they have, prayer; culminating with an exorcism of the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Stacy is a paranormal investigator. When a demon attacks her son she asks a colleague for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting of Summerwind
programme.desc: Ginger moves her family into an old mansion. A supernatural presence torments her husband.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters

programme.desc: A desperate father begs Judge Romesh not to let his son run off to the circus and a mother is sick and tired of her daughter bringing 'bad juju' into the house.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Searching for the truth behind one of the Church’s most mysterious relics – the Veil of Veronica – this programme follows the discovery and impact of the miraculous face of Manoppello – an image not made by human hands of the resurrected Christ.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of Hiram Bingham's amazing discovery of one of the great wonders of the modern world, Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: WW2 legendary Japanese looted gold is hunted by an amateur Filipino treasure-hunter

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: California Gold Rush prospector goes in search of a legendary lost treasure ship in the Mojave Desert.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London

programme.title: The Dictator's Playbook: Francisco Franco
programme.desc: Learn how Francisco Franco won the Spanish Civil War and became the dictator of Spain.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Angels of Death

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Serial Killers
programme.desc: Serial Killers victims are often selected at random. The murders have only one thing in common: the bodies are savagely disfigured. Hunting them leads investigators into a world of darkness.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Empty Quarter
programme.desc: The Empty Quarter is a windswept area of sand dunes. In a tiny corner of this vast desert lies Dubai, a glitzy ultra-modern playground. George heads out from Abu Dhabi on a 4W safari to see both sides of this corner of Arabia.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Indonesia
programme.desc: In Indonesia George visits massive Komodo Dragons, explores steaming sulfur vents of Papandayan, visits villagers whose town got swept away by Sidoarjo Mudflow, and tackles his toughest climb to date - the very active Semeru Volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fire And Water
programme.desc: It's the intense summer wildfires that often plague the area during their 24 hours of daylight. He travels by train, bike, plane and whitewater raft to reach the fires but Mother Nature has other plans for him and doesn't make things easy.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hottest and Coldest
programme.desc: George meets ultra-marathon runners in searing heat of Death Valley and bone-chilling cold of the Yukon. He dog-sleds in snow and meets wild characters like Caveman Bill, who has lived alone in a cave through 12 long cold Yukon winters.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Waterspouts
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, George uses a motorboat, a van and small plane to get up close to waterspouts - the nautical cousins of tornadoes. He also meets some of the 25 million alligators that live in the Sunshine State.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Water

programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?

programme.title: Arthur: Love Notes For Muffy/D.W. Blows The Whistle
programme.desc: When Muffy tries to bribe the judges at the school science fair, Francine and The Brain plot revenge. And D.W., a newly-deputized Junior Safety Officer, has a reputation for being a strict enforcer of the rules--well, OK, a tattle-tale.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success
programme.desc: Arthur's beloved piano teacher is retiring, but she assures him that the new teacher is outstanding--and famous, too! When Buster signs up to sell candy for the band, he figures it's easy money -- who doesn't love chocolate?

programme.title: Arthur: My Dad, The Garbage Man/Poor Muffy
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn's class is taking a field trips to visit parents at their jobs. Francine's not sure she wants the class to know her dad is a garbage man. And a new carpet and a sneezing attack means Muffy must spend the weekend at Francine's.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Pet Business/D.W. The Copycat
programme.desc: How can Arthur prove to his parents that he's responsible enough to take care of his very own puppy? "Get a job," suggests D.W.!. Yet another personality change for D.W., who's decided that from now on, she'll be just like Arthur.

programme.title: Arthur: The Director's Cut/Crime and Consequences
programme.desc: After meeting his hero, Hollywood director Tufton Sinclair, George is inspired to make a movie of his own. When George accidentally breaks the class's prize woodworking project, Binky gets unfairly blamed.

programme.title: Arthur: The Chips Are Down/Revenge Of The Chip
programme.desc: What a mysterious, beautiful thing a green potato chip is--and D.W. just ate a gigantic one! But then she hears a rumor that they're poisonous...Sure, kids do some pretty embarrassing things, but do Moms have to tell everyone?

programme.title: Arthur: Summer Stories
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Good Egg
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Safe Home
programme.desc: Safety first! After learning about fire safety when a firefighter visits the caboose, Barney and his friends are inspired to do a little "safety inspection" of their own.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop, BJ and the children prepare for the Shapes Carnival in the park./When it starts to rain at the park, Baby Bop joins Barney and BJ inside the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Coming on Strong
programme.desc: Exercise is good for everybody and every body! From running to touching toes to jumping jacks to some favorite songs and games, Barney and his friends grow strong while having fun with exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bunches of Boxes!
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Strongarm's Big Score
programme.desc: When Strongarm surprisingly scores the lowest on a skills test created by Fixit, she's determined to improve her score.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Pretzel Logic
programme.desc: Not wanting the overaggressive Dinobot to compromise his team's quest to capture the scavenger Decepticons and their Mini-­‐Cons, Bee sends Grimlock on a “solo mission” to the Alps.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mighty Big Trouble
programme.desc: The Scavengers find a most unexpected relic, even as their mysterious Mini-­‐Cons make their escape and their even more unexpected pursuer, Starscream, arrives on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mini–Con Madness
programme.desc: Starscream gloats over his impending victory, unaware that Optimus Prime has arrived to help the remaining Autobots. After being surprised by, and taken over by, the Mini-­‐Cons, the heroes ally with the Mini-­‐Cons, who share their secrets with the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Worthy
programme.desc: Starscream tries to absorb the power of six of the Mini-­‐Cons, but needs the seventh to obtain the ultimate power he craves for his revenge.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 1
programme.desc: Bumblebee, still relaxing after the Autobots' triumph over Starscream, feels his team can tackle any issue that might come up.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 2
programme.desc: Bumblebee struggles to bring his out-of-practice team to combat readiness as they square off against the missiles and oil barrel traps of Stunticon Heat seeker.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Defrosted
programme.desc: Grimlock begs to learn new fighting methods from reluctant “teacher” Drift –but Grimlock's initial attempts to put Drift's lessons into action fall comically flat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Blurred
programme.desc: While recovering one of Windblade's hidden caches, the Autobots run into Rescue Bot Blurr.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: The Bee Team captures a Skunkticonwho's obsessively guarding a strange Sphere-shaped artifact. The curious Sphere bears a more than passing resemblance to a mythical relic that can reveal the location of the lost city of Doradus.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Bee Cool
programme.desc: BLURR continues on as SIDESWIPE's intern, while BUMBLEBEE discovers a replacement Decepticon Hunter exists in Windblade's hidden cache on the island town of WEST ROCK CITY. Unfortunately, Stunticons DRAG STRIP and WILDCHASE find the cache first.

programme.desc: Unaware that they are under the influences of a powerful villain, Ladybug and Cat Noir are determined to get back to their lives as quickly as possible. They think everything is under control, but Shadow Moth prepares for his first big victory.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: After losing a contest to become a TV host on a children's channel, Aurore is transformed into Stormy Weather.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Ladybug must stop the Evillustrator, an akumatised boy who wants revenge against Chloe. Ladybug learns the Evillustrator has a crush on Marinette.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: After being expelled from school, Alya is akumatised into Lady Wifi, a villain who will stop at nothing to expose Ladybug.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Maudie is crushed when she seems to have misplaced tickets to a pop concert. The gang sets out to solve the mystery.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Kyle asks Ava and Maudie to film his soccer match, but Maudie realises that something about the game isn't quite right.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: The animal shelter comes to the school to audition children for a TV commercial, and Maudie suspects that a crime is taking place.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two girls climb a hill and look at the view. In Teletubbyland, Po looks for Tinky Winky. Over the hills, between the trees and along the path, but she couldn’t see him.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children play a game with their fingers. A voice trumpet rises and sings the nursery rhyme ‘Ring-a-Roses’ to the Teletubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy jumps indoors, the runs off to watch Annie and her dad land yachting on a beach. The Teletubbies sing 'Come Back Everything' song when a big wind blows their favourite things away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and Laa-Laa and Dipsy play a going up and going down game. They go up the hill and then they go down the hill. They do it again and again.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa dances with her ball. A little boy tells us why he likes to live in his block of flats. A balloon appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies follow a balloon.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making bubbles. Magic things happen when Laa-Laa bounces her ball all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children go for a ride on a Sea Tractor. Po goes for a ride on her scooter, while she’s riding she sees Laa-Laa’s ball, Dipsy’s hat and Tinky Winky’s bag. They’ve left them all behind!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and a group of children see Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty snake.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies play a bumping bottoms game. They stop to watch some children play some ball games. Laa-Laa’s ball goes in a puddle, she tries to get it back but can’t reach it.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa which makes them laugh and run away. The Teletubbies watch some children dancing with King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Bentley is organising a winter fair in the town hall square and enlists Bob to help set up the stalls, lights and the centrepiece of the fair – a giant inflatable Santa Claus.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s built a new waterwheel for the old watermill. He’s made it at the yard, but now needs to dismantle it to take it to the mill in sections. Bob needs Benny, Scoop, Lofty and Muck to carry the wheel sections through the marshland to the mill.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is putting up some new signs in Sunflower Valley to help people find their way round the valley. Meanwhile Dizzy has been asked by Ela Stevenson if she’ll be the ‘walking bus’ and help the children get to school.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race, which Mrs Percival has organised. Trix decides to enter, but unfortunately she practices with fresh eggs and in her usual haste she manages to make a great mess in JJ’s yard.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles wants a fence built around his compost heap, as Scruffty keeps getting into it. Muck is excited at the prospect of such a mucky job. JJ sends Trix up to the farm with the materials.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a marshland walkway with his Dad’s help. Benny hears that the marsh is ‘like a jungle’ and becomes determined to finds some jungle animals like tigers. Every time he spots one, however, it turns out to be something very ordinary.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are replacing some old pipes outside the town hall. Molly, meanwhile, is practicing for her first aid exam with a reluctant JJ as guinea pig. When Wendy calls JJ’s yard to order a special pipe and Molly offers to deliver it.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building a pedestrian crossing. Mrs Percival, meanwhile, has asked Molly to paint a mural of a jungle scene in the school playground.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Wendy and Bob have a very special announcement to make. They are going to fix up an old Houseboat for Wendy to live in. There’s a lot of hard work to be done. They need to make a gang plank, fix solar panels and give it a really good clean.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a plan to accommodate all of the newcomers. He’s designed a kit house that clips together quickly and easily. Bob’s dad Robert comes to the valley to help build the houses, while Mr and Mrs Bentley conduct a survey on the newcomers’ requirements.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s building a ‘drying tunnel’ for drying Annie seaweed. Muck passes Mr Beasley who’s having a spot of bother with his washing. He decides to build Mr Beasley a drying tunnel for his washing.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building a bunkhouse for Farmer Pickles guests The Pickers! Micky, Vicky and Little Ricky are helping with the sunflower harvest. The cabin is to be made of logs so Lofty’s job is very important today, lifting and laying the logs.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Team are converting Mr Sabatini’s windmill into a café. Roley is rolling the ground flat for all the tables and chairs while Bob makes the awnings. Roley hits trouble when molehills keep appearing where he’s just been rolling.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.desc: Tony Blackburn--60's DJ icon--and Toyah Willcox--an 80's pop phenomenon--take to the road with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson. Their journey starts in the historic town of York and ends up with an auction in Stanstead, Essex.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor Tom Conti and presenter Katie Derham fight it out with James Braxton and James Lewis to turn £400 into profit. Their journey takes them around East Sussex starting in Lewes and ending with an auction in Wandsworth.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and explorer Brian Blessed takes to the road with comedian Jenny Eclair accompanied by James Braxton and Anita Manning. They begin in Cockermouth and head south through Cumbria, ending up at an auction showdown in Runcorn.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Master of bowling spin Phil Tufnell battles it out with BBC Breakfast's sports presenter Chris Hollins for the best deals on antiques. Philip Serrell and Thomas Plant are on hand to advise as they tour the southeast toward auction in London.

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: Finals Night: Rising Stars Week.

programme.title: Paul Hinks: Most Iconic Moments
programme.desc: Refereeing legend Paul Hinks reveals how his career began and relives his most iconic moments.

programme.title: Murph Meets
programme.desc: Two-time world champion Adrian Lewis steps back into the spotlight in an exclusive interview with Chris Murphy.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Tami Lynn, Hudson Valley UFO (Pts. 1 & 2) and Daredevil Doe & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dial A For Abduction, Alamo Treasure, Deadly RX, Harold and Ma, Update: Mrs. Millionaire and Dates.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Socorro Close Encounter, Update: Car Crash Thank You, Kentucky Visions, Foster Twins & Update and Elevator Murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Casolaro, Update: Thelma and Louise, Mothman, Elysian Park Treasure, Fatal Flowers and Missing Rainman.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Baron 52 Crew, Scared to Death, Update: Thumbs, Fertility Statues, Rest Stop Killer and Thank You Philip.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sands Lake Secrets: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: Explore paranormal phenomena at Sands Lake – from mysterious voices to ghostly encounters. The secrets of this haunting location are unveiled.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Home After Dark
programme.desc: Seventeen year-old Tyson Efird disappears from the parking lot of the grocery store where he works in Malvern, Arkansas.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Taxing Death
programme.desc: After heading out for a routine day of appointments, Montana state auditor Walter Sullivan disappears. Nine days later, his body is found at the bottom of a cliff beside his mangled car.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: Rose Swartwood, an elderly woman living alone in a New York project, is stabbed to death late one night in a frenzied attack. For the next two years the case remains unsolved.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Memphis Police have a prime suspect in the gruesome killings of two prostitutes. But as they prepare to make an arrest, psychic Carol Pate pays the cops a visit.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Homestead Horror
programme.desc: Someone is attacking the elderly female residents of the depressed mill town of Homestead, Pennsylvania. Over the past four years, five women have been raped and assaulted in their own homes.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Bad Company
programme.desc: A Vancouver area nightclub owner disappears into thin air. Police believe he’s fled the city, traveling incognito under one of his many known aliases.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Staunton Stalker
programme.desc: The college town of Staunton, Virginia is being terrorized by a stocking-masked, knife-wielding serial rapist.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: Two teenage girls are killed horribly, months apart, on the outskirts of the northern Canadian city of Thunder Bay.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where's Grandad?
programme.desc: 65-year-old Alan Gordon Woodford of Bedford St. Mossburn left his home on foot Saturday morning April 20, 1985 and was never seen or heard of again.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Orphans of Gettysburg
programme.desc: On this premiere episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gettysburg to look into strange phenomena that connects civil war orphans with 3 locations and the 150thanniversary of the Battle of Gettysburg.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Phantom Fleet
programme.desc: Mayday! On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Buffalo, New York to investigate paranormal activity occurring on three former service vessels moored at the Buffalo Naval and Military Park.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Don’t Forget About Us
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Franklin, Kentucky to investigate Octagon Hallwhere secret tunnels have been found under the house, which are believed to have hidden confederate soldiersduring the civil war.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Family Plot
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lucas, Ohio for two cases. The first stop, to look into phenomena connected to a gruesome event, The Ceely Rose Murders.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dead Presidents
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to King George, Virginia to become the first paranormal team to investigate Belle Grove Plantation.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Nine Men's Misery
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Cumberland Library & Monastery in Cumberland, Rhode Island where \\"the practice of silence\\" has been disturbed by a brutal past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates two buildings, a forge and the cottage. He could not have imagined the activity that unfolded around him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P1
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house and seems to be pulled in different directions from an unexplained energy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl ventures down into the cellars of this large country house and soon comes under attack from an unseen force.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Royal Court Theatre - Bacup
programme.desc: The world famous ghost hunting team return for a new series and start in a small theatre with a big problem…ghosts.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Delapre Abbey
programme.desc: The team are joined by five members of the English rugby team as they investigate an all but forgotten piece of British history.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Drakelow Tunnels
programme.desc: p 8: Drakelow Tunnels - Kidderminster: With over 4 miles of haunted tunnels the team have one night to investigate this labyrinth of horror.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: Hans Kammler's fingerprints can be found all over the Third Reich's most prestigious and deadly engineering projects, including rockets and concentration camps.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: The designer of one of the most popular car brands in history, Ferdinand Porsche would not have seen his success without the support of Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: Fritz Todt was the man tasked with engineering projects including the autobahn, the West Wall defences and more. But in 1942, he died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: In his role as Adolf Hitler's favourite architect, Albert Speer was a central figure in the Fuhrer's inner circle and helped cement his position in power.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: Wernher von Braun was vital to NASA's Apollo 11 mission to put a man on the moon, but this 'American hero' had his Nazi past kept under wraps.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: As one of their most controversial scientists, Heisenberg was key in the Nazis' efforts to build an atomic bomb. How close was he to achieving his goal?

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Essex
programme.desc: Welcome to Essex. With a huge club scene and an entrepreneurial spirit, it was a natural breeding ground for new and old criminals alike. Bernard O'Mahoney explores the consequences for what became one of Britain's most notorious criminal hotbeds.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Live By The Sword
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have unwittingly surrounded themselves with criminals. Do these people always deserve the harsh legal consequences and should society turn its back on them for their mistakes?

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Birmingham
programme.desc: Examining the notorious Peaky Blinders, the flourishing gang culture in the sixties with links to the Krays, and how this culture continues today.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Glasgow
programme.desc: Bernard O’Mahoney begins his journey in Glasgow. Bernie meets the city’s first Godfather of crime, Walter Noval, former leader of the XYY gang, who discussed Glasgow’s underworld during the 1950s and ‘60s.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Manchester
programme.desc: One of Manchester's most infamous gangs was “The Quality Street Gang”. The gang was well known for sending the Krays 'packing' from Manchester when the infamous brothers tried to expand their operation Northwards.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Liverpool
programme.desc: The famous port's wealthy history has inextricably contributed to its prosperous underworld, wherein the likes of Charlie Seiga, Curtis Warren and Shaun Smith thrived.

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: The Hidden Truth

programme.title: The Hidden Hand Alien Contact and the Government Cover Up

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire & Guildford

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Northside

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wicklow
programme.desc: This week we're helping a young mother achieve her dream of moving back to Ireland. Sue Wessell longs to return to the place where she grew up and has persuaded husband Chris and their two children to up sticks and relocate to the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Devon Revisits
programme.desc: Newlyweds Sam and Jamie needed Kirstie's help to start afresh in a new home. Whilst Geoff and Sharon were making the move to Torquay and needed to find a home big enough for them, their kids, and Sharon's mum!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bristol

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Oxfordshire
programme.desc: Our first set of house-hunters are the closest thing to all action heroes Phil and Kirstie have ever had.

programme.title: Arthur: Summer Stories

programme.title: Arthur: The Wheel Deal/The Buster Report
programme.desc: After an injury, Brain has to spend some time using a wheelchair. Will he be able to compete in a basketball tournament for charity? The kids are assigned to write a report on someone they admire, and George picks….Buster!

programme.title: Arthur: Just Desserts/The Big Dig
programme.desc: Arthur has a hard time resisting sweets, and one evening his overindulgence wins him an upset stomach and some 'Grimm' dreams. Arthur and D.W. loved it when Grandpa Dave came to visit--but now he only wants to sleep and play checkers.

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker
programme.desc: After the Tibbles get a set of drums to play at the music festival, D.W. is determined to get an even bigger and louder one. Then, Buster is always telling the most incredible stories, but now he claims there is a tiger in the state forest.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play It Safe!
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney can't stop snacking on pistachios! Barney helps BJ explore the deeper meaning of team sports and friendships.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Make Music
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ have fun learning about music, rhythm and musical instruments. Barney introduces many different instruments and BJ dreams of one day becoming a rock 'n roll star. They discover that music gives everyone a happy feelin.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Bee Cool
programme.desc: BLURR continues on as SIDESWIPE's intern, while BUMBLEBEE discovers a replacement Decepticon Hunter exists in Windblade's hidden cache on the island town of WEST ROCK CITY. Unfortunately, Stunticons DRAG STRIP and WILDCHASE find the cache first.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Great Divide
programme.desc: When Stunticon Drag Strip steals a powerful Cybertronian artifact known as a Gravitic Adjuster, the Bee Team gives chase but are caught in an explosion that once again fuses them into the Ultra Bee Team Combiner (UBTC).

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Get a Clue
programme.desc: A string of mysterious explosives thefts leave the Bee Team flummoxed, but Strongarm is convinced that there's a criminal mastermind at work.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: DRIFT's former mentor SHADOW RAKER, a Fagin-like thief, has come to Earth to reclaim what he believes to be rightfully his — JETSTORM and SLIPSTREAM!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Disordered Personalities
programme.desc: After Fixit's latest attempt at combining the team, the Autobots ends up swapping bodies! They then discover that the Stunticons have entered the local Grand Prix, assuming that whomever wins will be crowned the literal “ruler of the roads.”

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Strongarm's best friend from her time at the Police Academy, Chicane, shows up at the Scrapyard.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Golden Knight
programme.desc: When Fixit discovers an ancient Cybertronian signal originating on an island off the coast of England, he begs Bumblebee to tag along on the investigation.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Fastest Bot Alive!
programme.desc: When FIXIT attempts to sample GRIMLOCK's DNA for a bot-combiner experiment, his Particle Sampler instead invests the once-slow Dinobot with dangerous super speed!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Railroad Rage
programme.desc: In his haste to polish Drift's Katana, Slipstream accidentally uses an acid that wrecks it. Before he can make repairs, the Bee Team races off to stop the Stunticons from stealing a high-tech train's engine.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Combine and Conquer
programme.desc: Bee insists his team begin to follow his orders more rigorously, but this new micromanaging strategy shows cracks when Motormaster attacks a Meteor Deflector facility.

programme.desc: The animal shelter comes to the school to audition children for a TV commercial, and Maudie suspects that a crime is taking place.

programme.title: The InBESTigators

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Ezra visits his nanna, but he feels grumpy because it's interrupted his detective work. However, she unexpectedly provides a case that needs cracking.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Patrick becomes upset on Science and Technology Dress-Up Day when an unidentified mad professor steals his robot costume.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Mario gets hungry for justice when his Kakow Koalas, the latest snack sensation sweeping the playground, go missing.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Ava tries to cheer up the lovesick Mr Barker by planning a birthday party, but his birthday cake goes missing during the event.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Convinced a minigolf customer is cheating in order to claim the prize, Charlie hires the Inbestigators to help save his job.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Birthday boy Toby needs the Inbestigators' help. His birthday invitation to friends has been mysteriously copied and distributed to the entire class.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa which makes them laugh and run away. The Teletubbies watch some children dancing with King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy comes out of the house, but has to go back in to fetch the other Tubbies. They watch some children picking oranges. Laa-Laa plays with her ball indoors, but it gets stuck.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some girls live with their Mum and Dad on a boat. They show us inside the boat. The Teletubbies come out of the house. Tinky Winky and Po go left and Dipsy and Laa-Laa go right.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Daniel and Stephanie make big round pancakes. They are having a round and round day. They run round and round in Teletubbyland, but they stop to see the dancing bear in the Carousel, then there's time for one more dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies love to dance, but they love children even more. So everything stops when the Teletubbies watch a film all about a little boy's special friend: a pig call Winnie. There's time for Tubby Custard before the Tubby Bye Bye.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say "Eh-oh", and then run off to watch two children go for a ride in a hovercraft. The Teletubbies are very careful not to drop their Tubby blankets on the floor, but if they do, the Noo Noo tidies up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to teach Dipsy a nursery rhyme. The Teletubbies watch two children playing with water. It rains in Teletubbyland, and makes a puddle.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies crawl through the arch in Home Hill and watch Alex Pascall and some children sing 'Handy Hands'. A pair of mittens appear in Teletubbyland and Tinky Winky does a special dance wearing them.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind the hills to say “Eh-oh!” before watching three children and Andy Brown look in Rock pools for shrimps. Tinky Winky, Dipsy & Laa-Laa look for Po.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes quacking sounds, which Dipsy finds very amusing. He joins the other Teletubbies to watch two children feeding some ducks. In Teletubbyland, Little Bo Peep has lost her sheep.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is erecting a tent to accommodate some newcomers to the valley. Mr Bentley is organising everything, but unfortunately leaves his phone with Spud who promptly declares himself ‘Mr Bentley’s Assistant’.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Travis is delighted to receive his own Talkie Talkie and can’t wait to make good use of it. Mr Beasley arrives in the valley with a load of yoghurt pots as he heard something on the radio about making them into a house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Whilst Bob and the team build Annie Pickles new seafront house, Muck is worried that Scoop is a better digger than he is and decides to prove himself with a sandcastle competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Sabatini has decided to move from Bobsville to set up the Sunflower Valley bakery. Bob and the team are going to build him a new house close to the river. Muck asks if Spud can tag along as he’s been telling him exciting stories.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. The job is straightforward, but the finished result looks rather plain, so Bob offers to get some tiles from JJ’s yard to decorate it. While Bob is gone, Mr Sabatini demonstrates his soccer skills to Dizzy.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop has spent the night in Bobsville and is off back to Sunflower Valley early in the morning. Benny is desperate to go too so Scoop promises to come back and take him as soon as he can.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Train enthusiast Mr Bentley is away for the day and, in his absence, Mrs Bentley decides to surprise her husband by asking Bob to build him a brand new model railway in the shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s job today is to repair an eroded riverbank. There will be LOTS of mud to shift and Muck is beside himself with excitement. Before Muck can get stuck in, Bob needs him to fetch some equipment from JJ’s.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and crew are demolishing an old barn for Farmer Pickles, but as Lofty tests his demolition ball he accidentally damages one of the pillars at the entrance to Bob’s yard. Wendy offers to stay and repair this while Bob gets on with the day’s job.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A new machine has come to the Valley – Packer the Delivery Truck. He’s to work with Farmer Pickles team. Farmer Pickles gives Packer his jobs and he sets off on his first delivery round.

programme.title: The Legend of the Golden Hammer
programme.desc: Our first sight of Fixham is in the episodic special The Legend Of The Golden Hammer. The Legend of the Golden Hammer consists of six stories in which Bob and his team tackle building jobs at six of Fixham’s key locations.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today Bob and the team have a very exciting job to do. They are building a bridge over the river to where Mr Sabatini’s new bakery will be. Bob promises Scrambler that he can be the first machine across the bridge.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is having problems with mice eating his barley seed so he asks Bob to build a seed store to keep it safe. Whilst Bob is working, Farmer Pickles decides to go and buy some replacement seed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has promised to put a cat flap in his kitchen door for Pilchard, but he gets an urgent call from Farmer Pickles who needs a fence built to keep the rabbits out of his lettuce field.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Master of bowling spin Phil Tufnell battles it out with BBC Breakfast's sports presenter Chris Hollins for the best deals on antiques. Philip Serrell and Thomas Plant are on hand to advise as they tour the southeast toward auction in London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Bond girls Honor Blackman and Britt Ekland hit the road in their Aston Martin to relive some 007 classics with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson. They're out to make a profit as they roar toward an auction in Greenwich, London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Father and son team Dan and Peter Snow go head-to-head with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson on the hunt for the best antique deals as they travel through Hampshire and along the south coast, ending at an auction in Billingshurst, Sussex.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Sir Terry Wogan and Caroline Quentin add a touch of class as they seek profits to donate to Children In Need. In a classic 1948 Jaguar MK 4 they tour Oxfordshire with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson toward a showdown in Chiswick, London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: British treasures Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie team up with experts Catherine Southon and James Lewis. They trawl the UK for fabulous antiques, from Potters Bar, through Hampstead and ending at auction in Heathfield, East Sussex.

programme.title: The Story of Raymond van Barneveld

programme.title: The Story of Chris Dobey

programme.title: Tungsten Talk

programme.title: The Darts Swap Challenge
programme.desc: Featuring Jonny Clayton, Joe Cullen, Fallon Sherrock and More!

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Baron 52 Crew, Scared to Death, Update: Thumbs, Fertility Statues, Rest Stop Killer and Thank You Philip.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Death of a Rock Star & UD, UD: Amish Hostage Murder, Terror by the Book, Home Invasion Spree and Fertility Statues.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Rainboy, Motorcycle Murder, Hospital Hoax & UD Hoax and Best Friend's Sister.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Doris Duke & UD, UD: Foster Son, Vietnam Orphans, Puerto Rican Monster and Money From Heaven.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Picture Taking Fugitive, John Burns, Deputy Death, Honky Tonk Woman, Update: Sharon's Search and Coma Healer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dear Patricia & UD, Lucie's Last Fare & UD, Unknown Mom & UD and Little Miss Panasoffkee & UD.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: Two teenage girls are killed horribly, months apart, on the outskirts of the northern Canadian city of Thunder Bay.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: How Dark the Woods
programme.desc: A lazy day at the lake in upstate New York turns to panic when a five year-old boy disappears into the woods.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A quaint New Jersey town is rocked when a local nurse, Betty Cornish, is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Psychic for the Defense
programme.desc: Investigators are perplexed when a gagged and mutilated body washes up on a Florida beach. The FBI is called in to help crack the gruesome case.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: In small town Ohio, a respected state trooper reports his wife missing. Then he tells the police she’s run off with a secret lover. But has she?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: In Thomaston Georgia, when local roofer Thomas Bragg is found murdered in his bed, the whole town is talking. The police suspect his wife, but they have no witnesses, no leads and no murder weapon.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: What Lies Below
programme.desc: When popular high school student Robert Piest disappears after his shift at a local drugstore, police in Des Plaines, Illinois, ask psychic Carol Broman for help.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Who Killed the Flower Girl
programme.desc: On July 1st 1996, 36-year-old Diana Goldston is abducted by a burly man in a pick-up truck in broad daylight outside the Denton, Texas bar where she sells flowers.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Buried in Debt
programme.desc: When wealthy Arizona businesswoman, Loretta Bowersock, vanishes on a shopping trip to Tucson, her charming partner claims she’s been abducted.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Breaking Up is Hard to Do
programme.desc: When Laura-Ann Beyerly vanishes without a trace, her parents immediately file a missing persons report. Her mother senses that something is wrong.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Nine Men's Misery
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Cumberland Library & Monastery in Cumberland, Rhode Island where \\"the practice of silence\\" has been disturbed by a brutal past.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: An Officer and an Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS and 2 special guests investigate the Brunswick Old City Hall where an officer was shot and killedin the 1890's. Will TAPS discover that he's still on duty?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Textbook Case
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to an abandoned school in Barnegat, New Jersey. Could the apparition of a beloved community teacher be luring children inside the building or are other spirits at play?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: 200th Episode: Grant is Back
programme.desc: On this 2 hour special, TAPS celebrates their 200th episode by re-visiting one of their favorite and most haunted locations, Trans-Allegheny Lunatic Asylum and by calling on old friends, Grant, Dustin and Joe.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Phantoms of the Opera
programme.desc: On this special Halloween episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Ohio to investigate the Cincinnati Music Hall, a buildingwhere the hauntingsare as frequent as the performances.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: If I Should Die...
programme.desc: Proven paranormal investigator Ken Arrington leads a new class of characters as they try to help a family cope with what appears to be a demonic spirit in their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Drakelow Tunnels
programme.desc: p 8: Drakelow Tunnels - Kidderminster: With over 4 miles of haunted tunnels the team have one night to investigate this labyrinth of horror.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The National Emergency Services Gallery
programme.desc: A terrifying place full of history and paranormal activity. The team are tested as the try to find the spirits that refuse to leave this famous location.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Galleries of Justice
programme.desc: The legendary ghost hunters continue in Nottingham and a place where people could be jailed, sentenced and executed without even leaving the building.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Newton House Part 1
programme.desc: The first of a two-part investigation with celebrity guests, world famous band ‘Bullet for My Valentine’.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Newton House Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of this spin-chilling episode. Nursing their wounds from the last episode the team and their celebrity guests ‘Bullet For My Valentine’ carry on.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Saltmarshe Hall Part 1
programme.desc: Saltmarshe Hall is a mysterious, haunted house of complete contrasts. Beneath the property lies a network of corridors and cellar rooms and the abandoned North Wing has sat empty for over 70 years,

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Second Sight, The Fine Line, The Wrong Turn, Who Was I, You Are Next.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Land, Titan, The Diary, Town of Remembrance, The House on Barry Avenue.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Needle Point, Toy to the Rescue, Mystery Lock, The House on Baker Street, The Train.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Bon Voyage, The Man in the Model T, The Scoop, Angel on Board, Buenos Dias.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Motorcycle, Blind Man's Dog, Deer Hunters, Tribal Curse, The Card Game.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: Meet a 10-year-old boy who’s attacked by a spirit and left with the sign of the devil. Then witness a series of strange and unsettling events that take place when a woman is looking after her three-year-old niece in her new home.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: See what happens when Ron is snowed in at work and forced to stay overnight at a former insane asylum turned hospital. Meanwhile, 14-year-old Maria spots a strange silhouette that turns into something even more terrifying.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: Join Amy and her mom in their new home, where they quickly get the sense that they’re not alone. Then see what happens after Jill returns from her grandfather’s funeral and hears the bathroom water running.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: See what happens after Robin’s daughter leaves for the evening and Robin hears voices coming from the living room. Meanwhile, Pauline and her younger daughter notice evidence of their deceased cat Kevin when they move into a new apartment.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: See what happens when a mother and daughter spend the last night of their trip to Ireland in a castle. Meanwhile, eight-year-old Greg heads to his kitchen to investigate a mysterious sound, which sets the stage for a series of terrifying events.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life

programme.title: A Haunting: The Attic
programme.desc: A series of photographs show what you cannot see with the naked eye: an evil face in the attic.

programme.title: A Haunting: Devil Inside Me
programme.desc: When John Drenner, Jr. finds a satanic bible, he unwittingly unleashes a sinister demon. The entity threatens John with violent physical attacks. Minister Bill Bean must act swiftly to perform a powerful exorcism and oust the demon before it’s too late.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghostly Voices
