programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting Echoes: Clarke Zoo's Secrets
programme.desc: Join us on a chilling investigation as we unravel the spectral enigmas within Clarke Zoo Gardens. Eerie encounters and eerie secrets await.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Beyond the Veil: Zoo's Ghostly Enigma
programme.desc: In the heart of Clarke Zoo, paranormal activity reigns. We journey deeper, uncovering spine-tingling apparitions and ghostly revelations.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Factory Whispers: Unraveling Unknown
programme.desc: In 'Whispers in the Factory,' our team delves into a historic site, where eerie voices and enigmatic questions haunt every corner. Uncover the mysteries of restless spirits as we journey through a chilling landscape of the unknown.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this eerie first installment of Ghost Dimension, Sean, Bex and Paul explore a long-abandoned farmhouse in Liverpool, where no one knows what happened to the original owners. Local legends tell of shadow figures, ghostly lights, and strange noises.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the thrilling continuation of Ghost Dimension at the Liverpool farmhouse, the paranormal activity intensifies. As Sean, Bex and Paul continue their investigation, they conduct the Estes Method, capturing more unexplained voices.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this episode, the team travels to Rhydymwyn Valley Works, a mysterious and historically significant location in Wales. Once used for top-secret wartime projects, this sprawling area is now abandoned and rumored to be haunted.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Mother's Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Otautau toddler Amber-Lee, aged two and a half, vanished from Kingston at the southern tip of Lake Wakatipu on October 17, 1992.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Fright At The Opera
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team anticipates the possibility of encountering a demonic entity at the Burlingame & Chaffee Opera House, in Carthage, Missouri.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: There Ghosts The Neighborhood
programme.desc: TAPSis called out to Joplin, Missouri to help 3 generations of afamilyliving on one haunted estate! Could both houses on the property harbor entities that couldbring harm to their children?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Plot Thickens
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, owners of a haunted theatre in Woonsocket, Rhode Island buy the building next door and activity spikes! TAPS investigates both buildings to see if spirits are traveling between the two locations.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Fortress of Phantoms
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads tothe historic Fort Adams in Newport, Rhode Island. The teams investigate three deadly eventsthat surprisingly weren't from battle!

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Houghton Hears A Who?
programme.desc: TAPS investigates Houghton Mansionin North Adams, Massachusetts where the repercussions of a deadly car accident could be behind unexplained phenomena on the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Darker Learning
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS has been called to investigate Southern Vermont College in Bennington, Vermont. The legend of a mysterious love triangleand suicidescould be at the root of frightening paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Connection
programme.desc: P.R.S. is called in to help a young mother tormented by an otherworldly connection to a teenage girl murdered in her neighborhood years ago. Could she have psychic ability or is there a more sinister force at work?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Basement
programme.desc: A history of violence may connect the spiritual activity in Heidi's Ohio home to a long run of misery and cruelty.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Tatton Hall
programme.desc: Something about Tatton Old Hall keeps bringing the Most Haunted team back. Something happens that stops two of the team entering, a poltergeist causes confusion and the team get a clear voice from beyond the veil.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1 of this terrifying place concentrates above ground. The team are alarmed at the results from a new piece of equipment and Yvette meets her match.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The Most Haunted team explore the underground of Fort Paull. With its foundations and footprint dating back 100’s of years the team are faced with some terrifying ordeals.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Annison Funeral Parlour
programme.desc: Coffins, murder and a malevolent spirit plague the team as they investigate this one-time funeral home. With one member isolated alone another in a coffin the team catch a poltergeist in action

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The underbelly of this great house is a sharp contrast to its upper grandeur. Some members of the team are forced to run while other are lost in the labyrinth of tunnels and passageways pursued by something unnatural.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Plane, The Gun, The Portrait, The Pass, The Caller.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Prophecy, Couch Potato, Love Over the Counter, Imaginary Friend, Last Man on Earth.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maya the Mermaid's musical practice causes problems with her friend Octavius the Octopus. The two get into a disagreement, and Fred and Gloomy must help mend a friendship.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends hear music from the Forgotten Forest and feel glum. They discover its source and realise that they must cheer up the Weeping Willow to stop its sad music from affecting everyone.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: In the forest, a melody so sorrowful resonates, casting melancholy over all who hear it. The source is Willow, a weeping willow abandoned by his group. Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy offer to play and sing alongside him, lifting his spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends clean up their houses for the Midwinter Munchkin on Midwinter's Eve. While the others get ready, Gloomy's messy house may cause the Midwinter Munchkin to skip his visit.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tulipop and the friends decide to visit Grumpkin. Poor Grumpkin cannot come outside to play. Gloomy and his friends decide to help him spend a day in the sun and thanks to a magic potion they will solve the situation.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is in the swamp and makes friends with a mud monster. Gloomy, Bubble and Maddy are a little scared of this little creature but soon they realise that he is funny and friendly.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Gloomy decide to go to an unexplored territory of Tulipop. Despite their fear of the dark, they encourage each other and discover a beautiful lagoon populated by small lava spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred, Maddy, Bubble and Gloomy go on a picnic in the forest to watch the leaves of the trees change colour. But suddenly the leaves turn blue. This is because the forest elf has lost his colour crystal.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: As winter has begun, the little friends decide to go ice skating. Maddy is not doing very well, but her friends are ready to help her so they can all play together.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tiger Moon falls into the sea, and the whole island must come together to help it find its way home.

programme.title: Tulipop

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear prepares a gift for the Lady Bear and, as usual, dreams of winning his lady's heart. But unfortunately, Masha is also there, and there is no telling what her interference will lead to.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: It's another New Year for Masha and the rest of the gang. Masha has a lot of experience in organising unforgettable celebrations, so she takes matters into her own hands this time around.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha saves Bear from a fire and a grateful Bear makes her a gift: a toy fire truck.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear has a problem: his garden has been overtaken by dandelions. As Bear tries to fight against the weeds, Masha doesn't understand why he is throwing them away. After all, dandelions can be beautiful!

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha is the best mommy in the world, but even she cannot put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: providing a music box. However, the music box turns out to hold a surprise inside.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: A van with monkeys arrives at the Bear's house. They invite everyone to test themselves with the help of an attraction: a power meter. The Bear is confident that he will easily win the main prize.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: She-Bear is going on holiday and leaves Bear with her pet: a flycatcher. The modest flower shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there. Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help, and, of course, Masha tags along with him.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The gang have a snow tower and a group of friends and it sounds like a recipe for a fun game. Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie, and Penguin as they figure out who will be the princess.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
